description: Two separate vote lists. `corrections` covers pending architect corrections targeting your role; `rules` covers pending global rule proposals. Both arrays are required. Use empty array when nothing to vote on in that category.

corrections.description: One vote per pending architect correction targeting your role.

id.description: The pending correction's id, copied verbatim.

reason.description: Required when verdict=reject. One short prose line naming the conflict.

rules.description: One vote per pending global rule proposal.

id.description: The pending rule proposal's id, copied verbatim.

reason.description: Required when verdict=reject. One short prose line naming the conflict.

examples.title: Both pending architect corrections and pending global rules exist for your role

corrections.reason: Conflicts with v84-1.frontend.rule.3 — local data flow is async by design.

rules.reason: Cannot honor a synchronous-write requirement on this role's queue-backed pipeline.

examples.title: Only pending global rules, no pending architect corrections for your role
